basics.name: Wenwei Cai (蔡文炜)
basics.summary: Postgraduate student at Peking University, majoring in Materials Physics and Chemistry. Familiar with DFT and proficient in VASP, Quantum ESPRESSO, and Gaussian. Passionate about leveraging first-principles calculations and AI for energy materials research.

education.institution: Hongkong University of Science and Technology

education.area: Master in Materials Physics and Chemistry
Bachelor of Engineering in Materials Science and Engineering

publications.name: Polyphosphates-Based Cathode-Electrolyte Interphase for 4.65 V LiCoO₂
publications.summary: Developing polyphosphates-based cathode-electrolyte interphase for high-voltage LiCoO₂ cathodes.

publications.name: Polarized Ni⁰-Niδ⁺ Catalysts Enable Asymmetric C–C Coupling for Long-Chain Hydrocarbons in Electrochemical CO₂ Reduction
publications.summary: AIMD simulations investigating Ni⁰-Niδ⁺-mediated C−C coupling mechanisms for long-chain hydrocarbons eCO₂RR.

publications.name: Confined proton transport in water-containing layered manganese oxide electrodes
publications.summary: AIMD simulations study on proton transportation in δ-MnO₂.
